description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.9 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs a before_script with 'npm install gitbook-cli -g', 'gitbook fetch latest', and 'gitbook install'. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that executes 'gitbook build . public', runs on all branches except master, and does not produce artifacts. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that also runs 'gitbook build . public', publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact expiring after one week, and only runs on the master branch.
